AccoRevit.Addin
Table of Contents

Class ViewModelBase

Namespace
AccoRevit.Addin.ModelViews.Helpers
Assembly
AccoRevit.Addin.dll

Base class for MVVM view models that provides property change notification, common dialog commands, and accessors for the active Revit UI/application context.

public abstract class ViewModelBase : INotifyPropertyChanged, IViewModel

Remarks

Implements INotifyPropertyChanged for WPF binding updates and IViewModel for dialog success signaling.

The static context properties (UiApplication, UiDocument, Document) are resolved through Nice3point Toolkit's context and throw if no active document exists.

Constructors

ViewModelBase() 

protected ViewModelBase()

Properties

CancelCommand

Gets the cancel/close command for the dialog, when applicable.

public ICommand CancelCommand { get; protected set; }

Property Value

ICommand

Document

Gets the active Revit Autodesk.Revit.DB.Document from the toolkit context.

protected static Document Document { get; }

Property Value

Document

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when there is no active document.

ExecuteCommand

Gets the primary "execute/OK" command for the dialog, when applicable.

public ICommand ExecuteCommand { get; protected set; }

Property Value

ICommand

IsSuccess

Gets or sets a value indicating whether the view model's workflow completed successfully.

public bool IsSuccess { get; set; }

Property Value

bool

UiApplication

Gets the current Revit Autodesk.Revit.UI.UIApplication from the toolkit context.

protected static UIApplication UiApplication { get; }

Property Value

UIApplication

UiDocument

Gets the active Autodesk.Revit.UI.UIDocument from the toolkit context.

protected static UIDocument UiDocument { get; }

Property Value

UIDocument

Exceptions

InvalidOperationException

Thrown when there is no active UI document.

Methods

Close(bool)

Requests the hosting window to close and sets IsSuccess.

protected virtual void Close(bool success)

Parameters

success bool

Indicates whether the dialog completed successfully.

OnPropertyChanged(string)

Raises PropertyChanged for the specified property name.

protected void OnPropertyChanged(string propertyName = null)

Parameters

propertyName string

Name of the property that changed. If omitted, the caller member name is used.

SetProperty<T>(ref T, T, string)

Sets a backing field and raises PropertyChanged if the value has changed.

protected bool SetProperty<T>(ref T field, T value, string propertyName = null)

Parameters

field T

Reference to the backing field.

value T

New value.

propertyName string

Name of the property that changed. If omitted, the caller member name is used.

Returns

bool

true if the value changed; otherwise false.

Type Parameters

T

Type of the property value.

Events

PropertyChanged

Occurs when a property value changes.

public event PropertyChangedEventHandler PropertyChanged

Event Type

PropertyChangedEventHandler

RequestClose

Raised when the view model requests the hosting window to close.

public event EventHandler<bool> RequestClose

Event Type

EventHandler<bool>

Remarks

The boolean argument indicates whether the close was a successful completion (true) or a cancel/failure.
